assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-23 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' followed by '|---|---|---|---|' and no data rows. Line 23 states 'No repositories configured — no Serena instances are available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 25-29 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-39 contain '## Code Intelligence' section stating 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and subsection 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence:
discovery-log.md lines 5-6: '### Serena MCP Tools
No Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools. The tool list was inspected and no tools matching the `mcp__*serena*` pattern were found.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence:
discovery-log.md lines 8-9: '### Atlassian MCP Tools
No Atlassian MCP tools were discovered among the available tools. No tools matching `mcp__atlassian*` or Jira-related MCP patterns were found.' Lines 11-12: 'Jira configuration fields were provided via manual entry:' followed by the field values.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence:
discovery-log.md lines 19-20: '## Code Intelligence
User was prompted about continuing without code intelligence since no Serena instances are available. User chose to continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 41-45: '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 46 after Bug Configuration). discovery-log.md line 24 confirms: 'User was offered security configuration and declined.' changes-log.md line 31 confirms: 'Security Configuration — User declined security configuration setup.'
